name: Restore preferred network option in Settings menu - Google Help
snippet: Open the Phone app and dial *#*#4636#*#*. Tap Phone information. Note the line under Set Preferred Network Type, 5G is enabled if it starts with NR. Changing network type - Google Pixel Community "Preferred Network Type" when set as LTE is causing problems support.google.com站内的其它相关信息

name: 行为变更：以Android 14 或更高版本为目标平台的应用
snippet: 对于以Android 14（API 级别34）或更高版本为目标平台的应用，在调用 BluetoothAdapter getProfileConnectionState() 方法时，Android 14 会强制执行 BLUETOOTH_CONNECT 权限。
